title: rourea orientalis var. hirtella
intro: Rourea orientalis var. hirtella, also known as the hairy rourea or hairy rourea, is a plant species in the family Connaraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rourea orientalis var. hirtella include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used topically to treat skin conditions.
